description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-tools that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on merge groups for main. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs for the same pull request or reference, except for the main branch. Use a single ubuntu-22.04 job with specific environment variables to build and test p4tools. The job should check out the repository with submodules, use ccache with a specific key and max size, build the tools with a script, and run tests with sudo and specific options.
